name: Picovoice
description: Picovoice — Privacy-preserving on-device voice AI platform for wake-word detection, STT, and NLU without cloud calls.

seo.title: Picovoice — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Picovoice: Picovoice — Privacy-preserving on-device voice AI platform for wake-word detection, STT, and NLU without cloud calls.

when_to_use: Deploying always-on wake word detection on embedded devices
Running offline speech recognition on Raspberry Pi or MCUs
Building voice commands that work without internet connectivity
Implementing on-device NLP for privacy-sensitive voice apps

pros: Works offline on Raspberry Pi and mobile
Wake-word, STT, and NLU in one SDK
cons: Lower accuracy than cloud STT giants
review.verdict: The go-to SDK for offline voice AI on edge devices; cloud STT still wins on accuracy for connected apps.
review.best_for: Edge and IoT developers needing offline voice AI with privacy
review.not_for: Cloud-first apps where Whisper or Deepgram accuracy wins

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
